I'm so tired of this "trend" of deconstructing the most evil characters and "reimaging" them as really the good ones. Why is it so hard and so "bad" to have clearly good and clearly bad characters in stories? the wicked witch was just that...wicked. she doesn't need to be more then that, she wasn't more than that. It's like Hollywood is determined to make every childhood villain the victim and confuse the minds of as many innocent children as possible. 10 years from now they will no doubt remake Harry potter so that Harry was the "real" villain and how Sauron in Lord of the rings was really the good guy...
remember the good old days when story telling was an art and Hollywood was actually good at it?

Because it's Broadway's second most successful stage musical which has been running since 2003.

It's a popular IP with a global fan base.

It's sad and shameful that writers of the present CAN'T create their own IPs! They're intellectually bankrupt and pumped full of agenda and/or hormones. They take great and successful IPs like The Wizard of Oz and make crap like this! If you like this good for you, I'm glad you have it. As for me I think it's complete trash and crapped all over the beloved stories, movies, BOOKS, etc from my childhood. It's happening over and over and over again. They take these amazing and timeless IPs and destroy them with their own personal crap or society's crap. Either way the IP being changed gets crapped on and perverted into something it should've never been. A complete hypocrisy of the Baum's works and his views he wrote into them! Shameful and disgraceful! I hope and pray this movie bombs. Also the Erivo actress is a wackjob attacking her own fans because of Woke, DEI, Leftist indoctrination has taught her she's a victim, a "movie star" victim just because she's black. That's racism at its core. Because True racists make everything about Race!
